title: Use-After-Free, Double Free, and Stale Aliases · Native Transfer Build
summary: An independent maintainer ports the generation-checked handle repair to a changed target with tighter memory, different input shape, injected allocation failure, and no worked solution. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of generation-checked handle repair with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace allocation, publication, last valid use, deallocation, stale use, and address reuse to diagnose use-after-free.
Prevent double free by assigning exactly one release responsibility per live ownership state.
Invalidate pointers to subobjects and one-past positions when the containing allocation lifetime ends.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.instruction:
